The question asks for the first interval of five years to have more than 100,000 deaths. From the original table, the relevant rows are:

Row 3: 1960-1965 - 89,000 deaths (below 100,000)
Row 4: 1965-1970 - 105,000 deaths (above 100,000)

The first interval to surpass 100,000 deaths is 1965-1970 with 105,000 deaths. Therefore, the Prediction Answer of 1965-1970 is correct.
